hero.title: Digital Document Vault
hero.description: A private owner-scoped vault for storing personal digital document files with searchable metadata, categories, tags, and expiry context.
points: Organize by category and document type
Review storage, expiry, and recent upload insights

flow.title: Upload → Organize → Search → Review
steps: Upload a supported document file with title, category, type, tags, and optional dates
Manage custom categories and keep documents grouped by owner
Search and filter by title, category, tags, type, and expiry state
Review storage, type, category, expiry, and recent upload summaries

differences.title: A personal vault without external verification claims
differences.description: Digital Document Vault helps users organize files they already own. It does not connect to government systems, cloud drives, identity providers, or document verification services.

items.title: Upload
items.description: Store supported PDF, JPG, PNG, and DOCX files with owner-scoped document metadata.

items.title: Organize
items.description: Use custom categories, document types, descriptions, tags, and optional issue or expiry dates.

items.title: Review
items.description: Download, replace, edit metadata, delete, and review aggregate insights from a protected workflow.

feel.title: A calm place for sensitive personal files
feel.description: The workflow is designed for users who need a practical document shelf, not a government portal or identity product.

items.title: Private
items.description: Documents and categories are scoped to the signed-in owner.

items.title: Practical
items.description: Files can be uploaded, replaced, downloaded, searched, filtered, and removed.

items.title: Bounded
items.description: No OCR, AI extraction, external storage sync, notarization, or official verification is included in V1.

audiences.title: Who uses Digital Document Vault
audiences.description: Digital Document Vault supports people who want important files organized in one protected Ansiversa workspace.

items.title: Individuals
items.description: Keep personal IDs, certificates, insurance, and household documents easy to find.

items.title: Families
items.description: Organize scanned copies and digital records by category and type.

items.title: Everyday planners
items.description: Track optional expiry context for files that need periodic review.

resourceSection.title: Vault records that stay searchable
resourceSection.description: Each document combines an uploaded file with lightweight metadata for retrieval.

items.title: Document facts
items.description: Title, category, document type, description, tags, issue date, expiry date, file name, MIME type, and file size.

items.title: Category management
items.description: Create, rename, and delete categories when no documents are attached.

items.title: Insights
items.description: Review total documents, storage used, category and type distribution, expiry counts, and recent uploads.

groupedSection.title: A focused document vault workflow
groupedSection.description: Each section supports one part of storing and reviewing personal document files.

items.name: Documents
items.description: Upload, edit metadata, replace files, download, search, filter, and delete document records.

items.name: Categories
items.description: Create custom categories and review document counts per category.

items.name: Insights
items.description: Review storage, type, category, expiry, and recent upload summaries.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: Digital Document Vault follows protected mini-app routing, isolated API data, generated API types, and shared shell navigation.
items: Owner-scoped backend records in isolated Documents and Categories tables.

finalCta.title: Open Digital Document Vault
finalCta.description: Start with documents, then organize categories and review vault insights.
